metadata.description: A network interface component. deviceClass covers a physical NIC (PF), a fully virtual interface (virtio / veth), a whole-NIC passthrough to a guest, or a partition derived from a physical NIC — SR-IOV VF, or a VLAN/macvlan sub-interface — with parentDevice referencing the physical NIC. Mirrors Redfish NetworkAdapter / NetworkPort / NetworkDeviceFunction.

deviceClass.description: Device realization (common-elements.md §7). partition = SR-IOV VF or VLAN/macvlan sub-interface off a physical NIC (set parentDevice + partitionMechanism); virtual = virtio/veth with no hardware parent.

partitionMechanism.description: Only when deviceClass=partition: e.g. sr-iov, vlan, macvlan, ipvlan.

location.description: PCIe slot / BDF / port designation within the parent (Redfish PhysicalLocation). Primary discriminator; for a VF/sub-interface, its index/name.

macAddress.description: MAC address (Redfish Ethernet MACAddress) — globally unique interface identity.

role.description: Semantic usage, e.g. mgmt | storage | tenant | trunk.

vlanId.description: 802.1Q VLAN id when deviceClass=partition with partitionMechanism=vlan.

macAddress.description: Realized MAC address (also a discriminator in identity).

relationships.description: The host the physical NIC is installed in.
For virtual / passthrough / partition, the guest the interface is presented to.
parentDevice — the physical NIC this passthrough/partition (SR-IOV VF, VLAN/macvlan sub-interface) is derived from. REQUIRED when deviceClass is passthrough or partition (common-elements §7).

adopts.role: network-interface component vocabulary (NetworkAdapter/NetworkPort/NetworkDeviceFunction: MAC, speed, MTU)
